requirement_topic.en: ANATEL Homologation for Wireless / Smart Luminaires (Radio Equipment)
requirement_topic.zh: 无线/智能灯具的 ANATEL 型号核准（无线电设备）
requirement_topic.zht: 無線/智能燈具的 ANATEL 型號核准（無線電設備）

summary.en: LED luminaires with integrated wireless functionality (e.g., Bluetooth dimming, Wi-Fi smart lighting, Zigbee) placed on the Brazilian market must obtain ANATEL (Agência Nacional de Telecomunicações) homologation before sale. Radiocommunication products are subject to mandatory homologation under ANATEL Resolution 715/2019 and related acts; testing must be performed by an OCD (Organismo de Certificação Designado) accredited by ANATEL, and the product must carry the ANATEL homologation seal and number. This covers radiated/conducted emissions and radio parameters for the licence-exempt bands used by the wireless module. Homologation is held by a Brazilian legal entity with a CNPJ. Purely passive, non-wireless LED luminaires generally fall outside ANATEL scope but remain subject to INMETRO certification (see ledbr-safety).
summary.zh: 带集成无线功能的 LED 灯具（如蓝牙调光、Wi-Fi 智能照明、Zigbee）投放巴西市场前须取得 ANATEL（巴西国家电信局）型号核准。无线电通信产品依据 ANATEL 第 715/2019 号决议及相关法案须强制取得型号核准；检测须由经 ANATEL 认可的 OCD（指定认证机构）进行，产品须标注 ANATEL 型号核准标识及编号。其涵盖无线模块所用免许可频段的辐射/传导发射及无线电参数。型号核准由持有 CNPJ 的巴西法律实体持有。纯无源、无无线功能的 LED 灯具通常不在 ANATEL 范围内，但仍须接受 INMETRO 认证（见 ledbr-safety）。
summary.zht: 帶集成無線功能的 LED 燈具（如藍牙調光、Wi-Fi 智能照明、Zigbee）投放巴西市場前須取得 ANATEL（巴西國家電信局）型號核准。無線電通信產品依據 ANATEL 第 715/2019 號決議及相關法案須強制取得型號核准；檢測須由經 ANATEL 認可的 OCD（指定認證機構）進行，產品須標註 ANATEL 型號核准標識及編號。其涵蓋無線模組所用免許可頻段的輻射/傳導發射及無線電參數。型號核准由持有 CNPJ 的巴西法律實體持有。純無源、無無線功能的 LED 燈具通常不在 ANATEL 範圍內，但仍須接受 INMETRO 認證（見 ledbr-safety）。

standards_or_laws: ANATEL Resolution 715/2019 — Conformity assessment and homologation of telecommunications products (Brazil)
ANATEL — Mandatory homologation for radiocommunication equipment (licence-exempt radiation restricted equipment)

summary.en: China's equivalent for radio/wireless luminaires is SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval, required for wireless-enabled luminaires (e.g., smart LED with Wi-Fi/Bluetooth) in addition to CCC. Conducted/radiated lighting emissions are separately governed by GB 17743-2017 (aligned with CISPR 15), required as part of CCC for relevant luminaire categories and tested at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Neither SRRC type approval nor Chinese CCC EMC test reports are recognised under the Brazilian ANATEL homologation pathway.
summary.zh: 中国对应的无线灯具要求为 SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，对于带无线功能的灯具（如具备 Wi-Fi/蓝牙的智能 LED）除 CCC 外还须取得。照明设备的传导/辐射发射另由 GB 17743-2017（与 CISPR 15 对齐）管理，作为相关灯具类别 CCC 的组成部分，在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室检测。SRRC 型号核准及中国 CCC EMC 检测报告均不被巴西 ANATEL 型号核准路径所认可。
summary.zht: 中國對應的無線燈具要求為 SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，對於帶無線功能的燈具（如具備 Wi-Fi/藍牙的智能 LED）除 CCC 外還須取得。照明設備的傳導/輻射發射另由 GB 17743-2017（與 CISPR 15 對齊）管理，作為相關燈具類別 CCC 的組成部分，在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室檢測。SRRC 型號核准及中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告均不被巴西 ANATEL 型號核准路徑所認可。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China
GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: For smart/wireless LED luminaires, Brazil imposes a distinct mandatory homologation through ANATEL that has no direct equivalence with China's SRRC type approval — neither scheme is mutually recognised. Key Brazil-specific gaps: (1) ANATEL homologation must be obtained via an ANATEL-designated certification body (OCD) with testing at an accredited laboratory before the product can be sold; (2) the product must bear the ANATEL homologation seal and number; (3) homologation is held by a Brazilian entity with a CNPJ — a foreign manufacturer cannot hold it directly and needs a local importer/representative; (4) this is in addition to INMETRO certification for the luminaire's electrical safety. Chinese SRRC approval and GB 17743 EMC reports do not transfer to Brazil. Non-wireless luminaires avoid ANATEL but a frequency/band review should still confirm the module is licence-exempt restricted-radiation equipment in Brazil.
gap.zh: 对于智能/无线 LED 灯具，巴西通过 ANATEL 实施独立的强制型号核准，与中国 SRRC 型号核准无直接对应——两套方案互不相认。主要巴西特有差距：（1）须经 ANATEL 指定认证机构（OCD）取得 ANATEL 型号核准，并在认可实验室检测后方可销售；（2）产品须标注 ANATEL 型号核准标识及编号；（3）型号核准由持有 CNPJ 的巴西实体持有——境外制造商不能直接持有，须由在地进口商/代表办理；（4）此为灯具电气安全 INMETRO 认证之外的额外要求。中国 SRRC 核准及 GB 17743 EMC 报告不可转用于巴西。无线功能以外的灯具可免于 ANATEL，但仍应进行频率/频段审查，确认模块在巴西属免许可受限辐射设备。
gap.zht: 對於智能/無線 LED 燈具，巴西通過 ANATEL 實施獨立的強制型號核准，與中國 SRRC 型號核准無直接對應——兩套方案互不相認。主要巴西特有差距：（1）須經 ANATEL 指定認證機構（OCD）取得 ANATEL 型號核准，並在認可實驗室檢測後方可銷售；（2）產品須標註 ANATEL 型號核准標識及編號；（3）型號核准由持有 CNPJ 的巴西實體持有——境外製造商不能直接持有，須由在地進口商/代表辦理；（4）此為燈具電氣安全 INMETRO 認證之外的額外要求。中國 SRRC 核准及 GB 17743 EMC 報告不可轉用於巴西。無線功能以外的燈具可免於 ANATEL，但仍應進行頻率/頻段審查，確認模組在巴西屬免許可受限輻射設備。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (wireless products) — ANATEL homologation via a designated certification body (OCD) required for LED luminaires with wireless functionality before Brazilian market placement; held by a CNPJ entity
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (wireless products) — SRRC type approval required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China, in addition to CCC; GB 17743-2017 EMC compliance required as part of CCC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires with wireless functionality require ANATEL homologation in Brazil under Resolution 715/2019 via a designated certification body (OCD), with the ANATEL seal and number on the product. This is separate from and additional to INMETRO electrical-safety certification. Chinese SRRC type approval and GB 17743 EMC reports are not recognised by ANATEL. Homologation must be held by a Brazilian entity with a CNPJ, so a local importer/representative is required. Non-wireless luminaires generally fall outside ANATEL scope.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 带无线功能的 LED 灯具在巴西须依据第 715/2019 号决议、经指定认证机构（OCD）取得 ANATEL 型号核准，并在产品上标注 ANATEL 标识及编号。此为 INMETRO 电气安全认证之外的独立额外要求。中国 SRRC 型号核准及 GB 17743 EMC 报告不被 ANATEL 认可。型号核准须由持有 CNPJ 的巴西实体持有，因此须有在地进口商/代表。无线功能以外的灯具通常不在 ANATEL 范围内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 帶無線功能的 LED 燈具在巴西須依據第 715/2019 號決議、經指定認證機構（OCD）取得 ANATEL 型號核准，並在產品上標註 ANATEL 標識及編號。此為 INMETRO 電氣安全認證之外的獨立額外要求。中國 SRRC 型號核准及 GB 17743 EMC 報告不被 ANATEL 認可。型號核准須由持有 CNPJ 的巴西實體持有，因此須有在地進口商/代表。無線功能以外的燈具通常不在 ANATEL 範圍內。

requirement_topic.en: Conducted/Radiated Emissions for Lighting Equipment (ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15)
requirement_topic.zh: 照明设备的传导/辐射发射（ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15）
requirement_topic.zht: 照明設備的傳導/輻射發射（ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15）

summary.en: Electromagnetic disturbance from lighting equipment in Brazil is addressed via the CISPR 15 family, adopted in Brazil as ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment). It covers conducted emissions on the mains supply terminals (150 kHz–30 MHz) and radiated emissions (30 MHz–300 MHz). Where applicable to the product family, EMC/emissions requirements are incorporated through the INMETRO conformity assessment programme (Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 and related acts) and, for radiocommunication products, through ANATEL homologation (see ledbr-emc-01). Testing must be carried out at a laboratory recognised by the relevant Brazilian body (INMETRO-accredited for INMETRO scope, or ANATEL-accredited for radio products).
summary.zh: 巴西照明设备的电磁骚扰通过 CISPR 15 系列管理，巴西转化为 ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）。其涵盖电源端传导发射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及辐射发射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。在适用于该产品族时，EMC/发射要求通过 INMETRO 合格评定程序（Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 及相关法案）纳入，并对无线电通信产品通过 ANATEL 型号核准（见 ledbr-emc-01）纳入。检测须在相关巴西机构认可的实验室进行（INMETRO 范围由 INMETRO 认可，无线电产品由 ANATEL 认可）。
summary.zht: 巴西照明設備的電磁騷擾通過 CISPR 15 系列管理，巴西轉化為 ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）。其涵蓋電源端傳導發射（150 kHz–30 MHz）及輻射發射（30 MHz–300 MHz）。在適用於該產品族時，EMC/發射要求通過 INMETRO 合格評定程序（Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 及相關法案）納入，並對無線電通信產品通過 ANATEL 型號核准（見 ledbr-emc-01）納入。檢測須在相關巴西機構認可的實驗室進行（INMETRO 範圍由 INMETRO 認可，無線電產品由 ANATEL 認可）。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (Brazilian adoption of CISPR 15)
Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 — Conformity assessment for LED lamps and luminaires (Brazil)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant product categories). Testing must be conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories in China. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not accepted under the Brazilian INMETRO/ANATEL conformity assessment pathways.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测须在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被巴西 INMETRO/ANATEL 合格评定路径所接受。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測須在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被巴西 INMETRO/ANATEL 合格評定路徑所接受。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15 and GB 17743 are both derived from CISPR 15, so emission limits are largely harmonized. Key gaps: (1) Chinese CCC EMC reports under GB 17743 are not accepted in Brazil — emissions evidence must be generated/accepted via the Brazilian conformity assessment route (INMETRO-accredited laboratory for INMETRO scope, or ANATEL-accredited for radio products); (2) where the product family's INMETRO programme incorporates EMC/emissions requirements, the test reports form part of the INMETRO certification dossier held by the CNPJ importer/representative; (3) if the luminaire incorporates wireless functionality, ANATEL homologation applies in addition (see ledbr-emc-01) and the radio-emissions evidence is assessed by the ANATEL OCD; (4) the relevant Brazilian standard edition in force must be cited. Products designed to GB 17743 limits will broadly meet CISPR 15-based Brazilian limits, but re-testing/recognition through the Brazilian route is required.
gap.zh: ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15 与 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调。主要差距：（1）GB 17743 下的中国 CCC EMC 报告不被巴西接受——发射证据须经巴西合格评定路径生成/接受（INMETRO 范围由 INMETRO 认可实验室，无线电产品由 ANATEL 认可实验室）；（2）当该产品族的 INMETRO 程序纳入 EMC/发射要求时，检测报告构成由 CNPJ 进口商/代表持有的 INMETRO 认证档案的一部分；（3）若灯具集成无线功能，还须适用 ANATEL 型号核准（见 ledbr-emc-01），无线电发射证据由 ANATEL OCD 评估；（4）须引用现行相关巴西标准版本。按 GB 17743 限值设计的产品大致能满足基于 CISPR 15 的巴西限值，但仍须经巴西路径重新检测/认可。
gap.zht: ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15 與 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調。主要差距：（1）GB 17743 下的中國 CCC EMC 報告不被巴西接受——發射證據須經巴西合格評定路徑生成/接受（INMETRO 範圍由 INMETRO 認可實驗室，無線電產品由 ANATEL 認可實驗室）；（2）當該產品族的 INMETRO 程序納入 EMC/發射要求時，檢測報告構成由 CNPJ 進口商/代表持有的 INMETRO 認證檔案的一部分；（3）若燈具集成無線功能，還須適用 ANATEL 型號核准（見 ledbr-emc-01），無線電發射證據由 ANATEL OCD 評估；（4）須引用現行相關巴西標準版本。按 GB 17743 限值設計的產品大致能滿足基於 CISPR 15 的巴西限值，但仍須經巴西路徑重新檢測/認可。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — CISPR 15-based emissions requirements (ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15) are incorporated via the INMETRO conformity assessment programme for the product family, and via ANATEL homologation for radiocommunication products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lighting-equipment emissions in Brazil follow the CISPR 15 family as ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15, incorporated via the INMETRO conformity assessment programme and, for wireless products, via ANATEL homologation. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with China's GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but Chinese CCC EMC reports are not accepted and the evidence must be generated/recognised through the Brazilian route at an INMETRO- or ANATEL-accredited laboratory. Confirm the exact EMC scope within the applicable INMETRO Portaria for the specific product family.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西照明设备发射遵循 CISPR 15 系列，转化为 ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15，通过 INMETRO 合格评定程序纳入，无线产品则通过 ANATEL 型号核准纳入。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但中国 CCC EMC 报告不被接受，证据须经巴西路径在 INMETRO 或 ANATEL 认可实验室生成/认可。请在适用 INMETRO Portaria 中确认具体产品族的确切 EMC 范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西照明設備發射遵循 CISPR 15 系列，轉化為 ABNT NBR IEC CISPR 15，通過 INMETRO 合格評定程序納入，無線產品則通過 ANATEL 型號核准納入。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但中國 CCC EMC 報告不被接受，證據須經巴西路徑在 INMETRO 或 ANATEL 認可實驗室生成/認可。請在適用 INMETRO Portaria 中確認具體產品族的確切 EMC 範圍。
